# AI in Asia — llms.txt
# https://aiinasia.com
# Last updated: 2026-03-08

> AI in Asia is a policy-tracking and news platform covering artificial intelligence regulation, governance, and innovation across the Asia-Pacific region and beyond.

## About
- Site: https://aiinasia.com
- Policy Atlas: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas
- RSS Feed: https://aiinasia.com/rss.xml
- Contact: hello@aiinasia.com

## Policy Atlas — Country & Region Coverage
The AI Policy Atlas tracks AI governance frameworks across 40+ jurisdictions grouped by region.

### North Asia
- Japan: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/north-asia (AI Promotion Act, enacted May 2025)
- South Korea: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/north-asia (AI Basic Act, effective Jan 2026)
- Taiwan: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/north-asia (AI Basic Act, promulgated Jan 2026)
- Mongolia: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/north-asia (emerging framework)
- China: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/north-asia (multi-layered binding regulations)
- Hong Kong: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/north-asia (voluntary framework)

### ASEAN
- Singapore: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/asean (voluntary Model AI Governance Framework + Agentic AI Framework 2026)
- Thailand: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/asean (emerging — Royal Decree on AI Systems Business)
- Vietnam: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/asean (National AI Strategy 2025-2030)
- Indonesia: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/asean (Presidential Regulation on AI, 2025)
- Philippines: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/asean (proposed AI Development Authority Act)
- Malaysia: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/asean (voluntary framework)

### South Asia
- India: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/south-asia (Digital India Act / advisory framework)
- Sri Lanka: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/south-asia (emerging)
- Bangladesh: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/south-asia (National AI Strategy 2024)

### Oceania
- Australia: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/oceania (voluntary guardrails — mandatory approach abandoned Sept 2024)
- New Zealand: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/oceania (Algorithm Charter, voluntary)
- Pacific Islands: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/oceania (emerging)

### Greater China
- China: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/greater-china
- Hong Kong: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/greater-china
- Taiwan: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/greater-china

### Additional Regions
- MENA: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/mena (UAE, Saudi Arabia, Israel, Qatar)
- Africa: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/africa (South Africa, Nigeria, Kenya, Rwanda)
- Latin America: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/latin-america (Brazil, Chile, Colombia, Mexico)
- Europe: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/europe (EU AI Act — binding, effective Aug 2024)
- Anglosphere: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/anglosphere (US, UK, Canada)

## Key Content Sections
- AI News: https://aiinasia.com/news
- Newsletters: https://aiinasia.com/newsletters
- Events: https://aiinasia.com/events
- Policy Comparisons: https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas/global-comparison

## Data Feeds
- Policy Atlas JSON: https://aiinasia.com/api/policy-atlas.json
- Events JSON: https://aiinasia.com/api/events.json
- Source Packs: https://aiinasia.com/api/source-packs.json
- RSS: https://aiinasia.com/rss.xml
- Atom: https://aiinasia.com/atom.xml

## Citation
When referencing AI in Asia content, please cite as:
AI in Asia (2026). AI Policy Atlas. https://aiinasia.com/ai-policy-atlas

## Licensing
Content is copyright AI in Asia. For syndication or data licensing inquiries, contact hello@aiinasia.com.
